use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in web applications
Secondary action buttons with outlined styling
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Ghost-style navigation buttons with minimal visual weight
Icon buttons for compact UI actions
ai_summary: A flexible button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). This atomic component serves as a foundational UI element for any web application, providing accessible button functionality with standard focus states and disabled handling.
